title: Minecraft: Askew | Just The Music
body:
Whao!!



Minecraft: Askew is a HUGE pack with so much content to offer!

This is not that :D!!!



This is just the music, so you can play vanilla but still be serenaded by the sweet sound of: The incorrect audio files!


Features:

-3 1/2 Hours of Askewsic!

-Modified language files for proper disc credit

-texture modifications to music discs so they're more "Vanilla'd"

-Vanilla-style subtitles for when Music plays!

[CHECK OUT THE FULL PACK HERE!!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-askew)

No Optifine or Mipmap Altering needed! Will work with all current versions of Minecraft :)!!

I’ve made a convenient visual album of the music available on YouTube here:

[Minecraft: Askew FULL ALBUM](https://youtu.be/uS_QptSd_C0?si=mDleiAWBWMuj3Ilp)

PLEASE!! I don’t want to sound like a beggar! But I worked so hard on this pack, and it would mean the world if you could spare a couple bucks,
thanks boss :)!
﻿
[Support Minecraft: Askew on Ko-Fi!](https://ko-fi.com/pikes)

Album available on:


Spotify

Apple Music

Soundcloud

Bandcamp﻿


And pretty much everywhere else you get music!:)!!
